div.div: Q1 2026 Security & Compliance Report44 incidents, $482M in losses, insights from 11 industry leaders.

a.p: Real-time threat detection and response in one platform.

div.p: Make your contracts resilient and secure with Hacken's expert auditors.
Real-time threat detection and response in one platform.

li.span: Transaction Firewall for blocking malicious transactions.
60+ detectors for on-chain and off-chain risks.
Automated defense actions: pause, blacklist, remove signers.
AI-powered threat signals to stay ahead of attackers.

a.p: Real-time threat detection and response in one platform.
Turn compliance into a competitive edge

div.p: Real-time threat detection and response in one platform.

li.span: Transaction Firewall for blocking malicious transactions.
60+ detectors for on-chain and off-chain risks.
Automated defense actions: pause, blacklist, remove signers.
AI-powered threat signals to stay ahead of attackers.

div.p: Explore $HAI — Hacken's token powering trust and transparency in Web3.
Explore Hacken's story—our mission, milestones, and dedication to securing Web3.

div.h3: Securing Web3 projects across ecosystems & languages since 2017.
